suppress.notes: False positive: CVE-2026-39883 affects OpenTelemetry Go SDK only, not .NET packages
False positive: CVE-2026-42154 affects Prometheus server, not the .NET Prometheus exporter library
False positive: PostgreSQL server CVE matched against Testcontainers.PostgreSql .NET library
